title: Work permit for overnight camp counsellors: Before you apply - Canada.ca
content:
- submit an offer of employment to Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) using the Employer Portal
- pay a $230 employer compliance fee, unless exempt
- give you the offer of employment number (a 7-digit number required for your application)

## If you want to work at more than one camp
If you want to work for more than one camp, you must take the following steps as soon as possible to avoid processing delays:
- Apply for a work permit for each camp you’ll be working for.
- Provide proof that you can work for more than one employer.
Each of your employers will also need to submit their own offer of employment to IRCC using the Employer Portal.
